overlap_notes: Family anchor for anti-integrin UC single-cell/spatial multiomics study. Public processed GEO data are available for biopsy scRNA-seq; raw data are controlled in dbGaP companion accession phs003502.v1.p1. DS110/DS111 should be treated as matched assay/tissue components rather than independent cohorts.
Matched blood scRNA-seq component of the anti-integrin UC single-cell/spatial multiomics study. Count as a component of DS109 to avoid double-counting the same study family.
Colon biopsy CITE-seq component of the anti-integrin UC single-cell/spatial multiomics study. Count as a component of DS109 to avoid double-counting the same study family.
Controlled-access PBMC single-nucleus multiome row. Count as independent unless future overlap with an existing cohort is found.

CosMx platform component of IBD spatial transcriptomics platform benchmark. Keep countability Unclear pending sibling-platform counting policy because CosMx and Xenium are parallel profiles rather than a parent/component hierarchy.
